zh.lifeSummary: MRS. JOHN HOLYWOOD於大約1229年與John Holywood結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: MRS. JOHN HOLYWOOD于大约1229年与John Holywood结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。

nameMeanings.name: HOLYWOOD
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish: of Norman origin, possibly a habitational name from Hollywood, Dublin.
Irish: adopted for Gaelic Ó Cuileannáin ‘descendant of Cuileannán’, a personal name apparently based on a diminutive of cuileann ‘holly tree’, and more commonly Anglicized as Cullinan or Cullen .

English: possibly a habitational name from any of various farms or hamlets in England called Hollywood, such as one in Sandon and Burston (Staffordshire), perhaps named with Middle English holli ‘holly’ + wode ‘wood’. However, the place is not on record before 1775, and all Hollywoods appear to be late.

variants.name: Cullinan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Cormac.
Irish (Clare): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Cuileannáin ‘descendant of Cuileannán’, from a diminutive of Cuileann (see Cullen 2).

nameMeanings.name: MRS.
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: JOHN
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

en.lifeSummary: MRS. JOHN HOLYWOOD married John Holywood about 1229. They were the parents of at least 1 son.

fr.lifeSummary: MRS. JOHN HOLYWOOD a épousé John Holywood environ 1229. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils.

de.lifeSummary: MRS. JOHN HOLYWOOD hat um 1229 John Holywood geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: MRS. JOHN HOLYWOOD lei sposato John Holywood circa 1229. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio.

ja.lifeSummary: MRS. JOHN HOLYWOODは約1229年にJohn Holywoodと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: MRS. JOHN HOLYWOOD(은)는 대략 1229년 John Holywood(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: MRS. JOHN HOLYWOOD casou-se com John Holywood aproximadamente 1229. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho.

ru.lifeSummary: MRS. JOHN HOLYWOOD вышла замуж за человека по имени John Holywood около 1229 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын.
